title: OpenTelemetry
abstract: OpenTelemetry is an observability framework for producing, collecting and standardizing telemetry such as traces, metrics and logs.
description: A technology record for OpenTelemetry as telemetry infrastructure for distributed systems and AI tool workflows.
roleInEcosystem: OpenTelemetry gives distributed systems a shared telemetry vocabulary for spans, metrics, logs, attributes and semantic conventions.
bodyHtml:
Role

OpenTelemetry supports operational understanding by standardizing how systems describe requests, spans, logs, metrics, errors and service context.

Use

Electronic Artefacts can use OpenTelemetry as a reference for observing VASTE event propagation, AI tool calls, graph projections and user-visible runtime behavior.

References

See the OpenTelemetry semantic conventions and the related generative-AI and MCP telemetry work.
